javadoc_after:
/** * Sets the minute of hour field in a copy of this LocalTime, leaving this * instance unchanged. *

* LocalTime is immutable, so there are no set methods. * Instead, this method returns a new instance with the value of * minute of hour changed. * * @param minute the minute of hour to set * @return a copy of this object with the field set * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the value is invalid */
